text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess and I are in the waiting room
before the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Like, of course! Bein' cool is all about stickin' hard
to your own way of life!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You totally blew my mind with what you said at
the Fan Fest! It, like, put me on the right track or
somethin'...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(This racer's name is Vodka. Currently in her
classic year, she switched focus from the Tiara
tour to the Triple Crown tour midway through and
won the Derby.)
choice_data_list: It's about time to enter the paddock.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh crap, you're right! Sorry for keepin' ya!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
In order to stick to my own creed of cool, I'm
gonna take this opportunity to repay you—no, to
challenge you with everythin' I've got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Slam!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoaaaa...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka, an Umamusume in the year below
Kawakami Princess, has also declared her
intention to enter the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One of the prestigious Grand Prix races, the
Takarazuka Kinen is open to Umamusume in both
their senior and classic years. However, no
classic-year racer has ever won it.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'm all fired up now!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: A rising star taking on a challenge said to be impossible! This twist reminds me of Princess Fighter☆Returns episode thirty-five!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That episode's a fan favorite, where heroines old
and new clash! It's a dire situation where the
legendary Princess gets revived as a formidable
Shadow!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But the new heroine meets the Princess head on
without backing down! And in the end...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Well, of course the protagonist has to prevail
over...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Gah?! I... I am going to win this race, right?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I may be the Princess, but I'm no Shadow! I'm
going to achieve victory for my own sake!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess exudes fierce determination,
but younger racers aren't the only ones who will
be waiting for her at the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Are you ready for your thrashing, Kawakami?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: K-King?! Now this is what you call a plot twist!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But I won't let anyone else claim victory. I'm ready
to smash any opponent who stands in my way and
climb to the top!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hrrrrrng! I'll see you at the paddock, King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: She seems pretty sure of herself. Hehe...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Children grow up so fast, don't they?
choice_data_list: Aren't you still a kid yourself?
Aren't you still a kid yourself?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Who? Me? I'm no child—I'm the King.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh heh... Vodka... You'll have to train one
hundred years before you can hope to best me!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa, Kawakami? You're soundin' kinda
sinister all of a sudden...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Heh, heh. This is who I am.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now, let us reveal to each other the paths we
tread. This race is for us and nobody else!
